headings.usage: Use for all major headings (H1-H3). Uppercase ONLY. Letter-spacing: 1px.

labels.usage: Use for overlines, labels, button text, and data metrics. Uppercase + tracking-widest.

body.usage: Use for paragraph text. Clean, legible, modern.

layout_strategies.grid_system: Bento-style asymmetric grids. Use visible 1px borders (border-white/10) to define structure (Bloomberg terminal vibe).
layout_strategies.spacing: Generous. Minimum section padding py-24 or py-32. Gap-8 or gap-12 for grids.
layout_strategies.alignment: Left-aligned for text. Asymmetric positioning for visual tension. NO centered text blocks unless specifically for a 'Manifesto' quote.

buttons.primary: bg-[#E8000D] text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-all duration-300 font-barlow uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 clip-path-corner-cut text-lg font-bold shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(232,0,13,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,255,255,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-[#E8000D] hover:text-[#E8000D] transition-all duration-300 font-barlow uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 text-lg font-bold

inputs.style: bg-[#121212] border border-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-white/30 rounded-none focus:border-[#E8000D] focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none p-4 font-manrope transition-colors

cards.style: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 p-8 hover:border-[#E8000D]/50 transition-colors group relative overflow-hidden

navbar.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#080808]/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5
navbar.content: Logo (Bebas Neue, text-3xl), Navigation Links (Barlow Condensed, uppercase), 'Join Beta' Button (Primary)

hero.style: min-h-screen flex flex-col justify-center relative overflow-hidden pt-20
hero.typography: H1: text-[12vw] leading-[0.85] font-bebas uppercase text-white mix-blend-difference. Sub: text-xl font-manrope text-gray-400 max-w-md.
hero.effects: Subtle red glow spot behind text. Noise overlay opacity-20.

ticker.style: bg-[#E8000D] py-4 transform -rotate-1 scale-105 border-y-4 border-black
ticker.content: Infinite scrolling text. Font: Bebas Neue. Text: 'PERFORMANCE BASED • TRANSPARENT • INSTANT PAYOUTS • 17KATAS •'

stats.style: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 divide-y md:divide-y-0 md:divide-x divide-white/10 border-y border-white/10 bg-[#0A0A0A]
stats.value_style: text-6xl md:text-8xl font-bebas text-white group-hover:text-[#E8000D] transition-colors
stats.label_style: text-sm font-barlow tracking-[0.2em] text-gray-500 uppercase mt-2

how_it_works.card_style: border border-white/10 p-8 relative hover:border-[#E8000D] transition-colors
how_it_works.step_number: text-[#E8000D] font-bebas text-6xl opacity-50 absolute top-4 right-4

manifesto.text: text-4xl md:text-6xl font-bebas leading-tight max-w-4xl mx-auto uppercase text-white/90

waitlist.layout: Split screen. Left: Brands (Black bg). Right: Distributors (Dark Grey bg).

images.usage: Hero background or section divider overlay

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' with thin stroke width (1.5px) to match the elegant technical feel.

technical_instructions: UPDATE tailwind.config.js to include fonts: fontFamily: { bebas: ['Bebas Neue', 'sans-serif'], barlow: ['Barlow Condensed', 'sans-serif'], manrope: ['Manrope', 'sans-serif'] }.
ADD colors to tailwind config: accent-red: '#E8000D', deep-black: '#080808'.
USE 'framer-motion' for scroll reveal (fade up) and ticker animation.
ENSURE mobile responsiveness. On mobile, grid-cols-1 and stack elements.
ADD 'clip-path' utility class in tailwind or css for the cut-corner buttons.
IMPLEMENT 'lenis' for smooth scrolling if possible, or standard smooth behavior.
universal_guidelines: NO gradients except subtle radial glows.
NO rounded corners on main containers (Buttons can have cut corners, inputs sharp).
Use data-testid for all interactive elements.
Maintain strict contrast ratios (White text on Black bg).
